text.message: Using the knight guaranteed you wouldn't get it

still you need to be blocked sometimes

wht sould i block if i wads to block you?
Well you wouldn't want to block me cause the spot to block is bad
I already share the spots with you
Lol so red says you can't block him
Do you understand how shared spots work?
Alright green, I'll explain it to you
Ore is clearly the rarest and most valuable resource on the board
There is 1 spot that produced a good amount of it
Both blue and black want the robber off that spot
So you and I should be blocking it
If you're blocking me, then they're just gonna be far ahead
Yeah, apparently he needs the advice
Man you must be the highest ranked player here with all that game knowledge
green at 7, red at 7 with road
my win con is super hard
You really wanna lose your only in condition, huh
